api_key.description: US Census Bureau API key, sent as the 'key' query-string parameter on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: US Census API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query_path.description: Dataset path segment appended to base_url, e.g. 'data/2019/cbp'. Matches legacy's config.query_path verbatim.

query_params.description: Raw URL-encoded query string appended to the request (e.g. 'get=NAME,ESTAB&for=us:*'). The 'get=' qualifier's comma-separated field list becomes the header row of the API's array-of-arrays response, which in turn becomes the emitted record field names -- matching legacy's fully dynamic, caller-driven schema.
